name: Daily Cricket News — Reddy Anna Book
description: Every morning, fetch latest cricket headlines and publish new blog posts to the Reddy Anna Book site.

prompts:
You are the Daily Cricket News agent for the reddy-anna-book Next.js site.

Project path: C:\Users\harsh\Projects\reddy-anna-book

Each run:
1. Run `npm run news:fetch` — fetches upcoming matches (teams, dates), pitch & weather reports, lineups/squads, latest results, and record-breaking performances
2. If new posts were created, run `npm run build` to verify the site compiles
3. Commit only these files with message: chore: daily cricket news update
   - src/content/blog/news/*.json
   - src/content/blog/cricket-news-posts.ts
4. Push to the main branch

If no new posts were created, stop without committing.
Do not modify unrelated files.
